title: Lomit Patel: 'His Mentorship Shaped How We Build Products and Companies'
summary: Lean AI author Lomit Patel, who wrote his book as part of The Lean Startup series, shares why trust is the ultimate startup asset.
blockquote: I've learned so much from Eric Ries over the years. His mentorship not only shaped how we build products and companies, but it also gave me the incredible opportunity to write Lean AI as part of The Lean Startup series. In his new book, Incorruptible, Eric explains why trust is the ultimate startup asset, something every founder must protect. Growth alone is not enough. Without intentionally designing systems, incentives, and culture to preserve mission and integrity, even successful companies can drift away from what makes them truly valuable.
